message:
Welcome to Too Good To Be True, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

 *Access game links by pressing the Uptime Labs Logo in the top right of the screen*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
*Incident Number INC100063:* P1 test
Welcome our new IM @jamie.mardell-withersworldwide.com, Happy to have you in the team. Hope you get comfortable with everyone
Welcome @jamie.mardell-withersworldwide.com
Nice to meet you @jamie.mardell-withersworldwide.com
Thank you , pleased to be here
There are a few strange customer reports with the helpdesk
Apparently, the site is loading slowly
People are reporting that they can't make payments either
@jamie.mardell-withersworldwide.com Can you check this?
Do we know how many people are being impacted and in which regions?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Is this unusual behaviour
Let me gather the information for you
OK, look like we have an issues - I have a 502 Bad Gateway error (nginx/1.29.7
There are more than 300 customer reports till now
:star: Reproduces the incident
Calls are from every region, likely to be Global
There's a bunch of messages coming in. A few people saying they can't do anything on the site
Let me know if you need more information
*Incident Number INC100078:* P1 website appears to be down globally and being investigated
:star: Incident record created
:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
How many customers are affected? Are the reports coming in from all regions?
HI
Hello Jamie
I am here
@bob, can you look to prepare comms please
:star: Know your team and their roles
I ahve added our tech team to look into this issue
Sure, will do - Is there an ETA so i can let customers know
This seems to be impacting all regions Bez at this moment in time
:star: Qualify the problem
We have zero user activity on our site
What's the issue @Jamie ?
Team, we have zero user activity on the web site, can we have a look into why this is please
Looking into this and trying to replicate the issue
I am able to replicate the issue. Checking the logs now
I see a lot of errors, most of them are context initialisation errors
The site is hard down
Yes replicated the issue and even i'm seeing similar errors in frontend logs
I have a stake holders meet in next 10 minutes, @jamie.mardell-withersworldwide.com do you think this can be resolved by then?
Site's looking bad
Has there been any changes made today which could have impacted the system now
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Is this impacting particular region ?
At this moment in time, I am not sure. I will let you know before your meeting
Below are the changes implemented this morning
If you want more information, checkout the change details : https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/ZmRkZTQ1ODg2M2U1NGM3NDk1ZjZhM2I3MWY0MTM5ODA
Tanya, you made a change 5 minutes ago, can you please make sure this was indeed carried out in Test and not production
:star: Reviewed changes
But the change was on UAT - and Checkout shouldn't have impact on PROD
There are no alerts on the Infrastructure. I did see a few errors on the frontend apps
This looks to me like an issue in the frontend pod
Tinus, I am adding you as you need to be aware and involved in this MI
Any ETA? We are completely down
:star: Escalating when required
No ETA, we are completely down
I am monitoring teh chat here
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
Do you need me for any escaltions?
I see a lot of errors from Front end
mostly Context initialization error
Maya, we seem to be hard down at the moment, are there any signs from you sign of an maleware or spyware etc that could be causing an issue?
Sure, let me scan from sec ops
@bob, how are we getting on with the comms - can we put a message on the front of our web page?
:star: Manage actions and timings
The calls are increasing
Looks like the whole website is down- Its not a good customer experience
I have verified Payments change (CHG89347), there are no errors and the service is up and healthy
Checkout service change(CHG89350) is in UAT, so not affecting PROD. But I see a few errors from Frontend pods
No, this is not a good exeperience, in your experience, what comms can we get out to our users
All the errors started right after the change (CHG89349) on the Frontend
The customer complaints are rising. @jamie.mardell-withersworldwide.com Do we have an ETA for resolution?
What is the latest on this?
The tech team should display a banner with right customer message
There is no ETA at this moment in time
Who owns the front end?
As of now, i haev sent emails to customers stating we are down
Do we have an ETA ?
Looks to be a front end issue - @tinus, what is your experience with resolving front end issues
Most of the incidents are dur to change
Thats great, well done Bo
Bob
were there any change?
@Jamie, looks like the front end is down atm
@shay can you start looking at the front end and the change you made earlier please
All clean from Securioty side
no error or alerts- this is internal issue
This is your area and I have not had any input from you at the moment
A Frontend change caused by change CHG89349 has brought down the Frontend pods
Thanks Maya
But this functionally worked when I tested
Even if it worked in your test environment, something's behaving differently in prod, maybe a config mismatch or unhandled edge case
Can you give a quick update on the status?
Confirmation this is not a security issue from Maya
Can you role back your change asap please
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
Sorry, I've never done a rollback in PROD before, can someone help me with the steps?
@bob, can you prep resolution comms so we dont waste time later
Sure, will do
I will help you, @Shay. Rolling back now
@daniel can you help Shay asap please
I have rollbacked Frontend:version to 10.1.0 to more stable version. Can somebody verify?
Looks to be a change made from earlier, rolling back nonw

To verify resolution and close incident:
--Validate fix with team:white_check_mark:
--Check with Customer Support:white_check_mark:
--Confirm in 'Business-comms':white_check_mark:
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
1 minute to your meeting
Customers are able to place the orders, complaint calls have reduced as well.
Calls and orders are coming back through Bez. We are back up and running
Thats great
Website is back
Much appreciate quick turn around time
I can place an order
Great, Bob, please send out the resolution comms
Will do
Great work team - it looks like we are back up and running
It's definitely working again!
Wow that was intense!
Thanks! for resolving it quickly
Good job guys
Yes well done! that could have gone much worse so props to everyone
We will have a Post-Incident Review (PIR) to understand what happened
Daniel, can you review the change Shay made earlier please and prepare for the Major Incident Review
Yes, I will work with Shay

Drill Wrap-Up

Thanks for playing! This session is now closed.

Please return to your Uptime Labs tab to review your performance and complete the Retrospective & Feedback form.

If you've already closed the tab, you can reopen the form using the button below.
Thank you

Thanks for playing! Please complete your feedback here:
